REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF CPH 564, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP NOTICE OF APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION IS GRANTED. FF&E REMOVED FROM THE PREMISES AND LISTED IN PARAGRAPH 4 OF THE APPLICATION SHALL BE RETURNED TO THE PREMISES. FOR THE DURATION OF THIS ACTION FF&E BROUGHT ON THE PREMISES BY THE TENANT SHALL REMAIN IN POSSESSION OF THE LANDLORD. FF&E SHALL REMAIN AT THE PREMISES IN POSSESSION AND CONTROL OF THE LANDLORD. LANDLORD MAY MOVE THE ITEMS TO A SECURE STORAGE FACILITY APPROPRIATE FOR STORAGE OF THE ITEMS SUBJECT TO DISPUTE AT THE LANDLORD'S SOLE COST. THE COST OF STORAGE SHALL SATISFY THE BOND REQUIREMENT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (501)

Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession And Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-28-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: (Zoom)
Michael Hsueh, 408.606.6300 for Plaintiff CPH 564, LP.
James Ficence, 925.988.3200 for Defendants Per Diem LLC and Darren Matte.

Argued by Plaintiff. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF CPH 564, LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP Notice Of Application For Writ Of Possession is GRANTED. FF&E removed from the premises and listed in paragraph 4 of the application shall be returned to the premises. For the duration of this action FF&E brought on the premises by the tenant shall remain in possession of the landlord. FF&E shall remain at the premises in possession and control of the landlord. Landlord may move the items to a secure storage facility appropriate for storage of the items subject to dispute at the landlord's sole cost. The cost of storage shall satisfy the bond requirement. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
